    1,26,01,15,09,52,10,64,0.23,12.10,340.0,20919.000,0.29,14.10,346.0,53,0.091,312,0.087,308,0.077,303,0.078,307,0.070,304,0.056,297,0.046,302,0.055,326,0.042,305,0.030,297,0.023,335,0.027,326,0.020,340,0.027,315,0.018,  0,0.007,  0,0.006,279,0.014,163,0.031,167,0.041,139,0.034,143,0.035,140,0.048,150,0.047,151,0.029,170,0.043,159,0.046,158,0.052,160,0.042,156,0.066,166,0.074,165,0.101,170,0.097,163,0.096,163,0.115,168,0.104,167,0.091,141,0.141,171,0.416,162,0.597,156,0.659,166,0.482,177,0.343,165,0.261,160,0.212,155,0.187,157,0.174,154,0.156,150,0.150,152,0.140,150,0.144,154,0.133,149,-32768.000,-32768
<FINISH>
